steps.t: Gwedhir is south-west of the ruins of Díngarth, in Dor Amarth. Mithrandir asked you to find Gwedhir in Dor Amarth and hear his report.
Harthalín is west of Faltor Gâm, in Agarnaith. Mithrandir asked you to find Harthalín in Agarnaith and hear her report.
Thenca is south of Agarnaith, by the road in Talath Úrui. Mithrandir asked you to find Thenca in Talath Úrui and hear his report.
Mithrandir is at Cirith Gorgor, just inside the Black Gate.
